register.title: Create account
register.description: Start tracking your car service history

hero.title: Your car's service history, always at hand
hero.description: Service Book is a simple tool to log and track maintenance records for all your vehicles — oil changes, inspections, repairs, and more.

multipleCars.title: Multiple Cars
multipleCars.description: Keep track of all your vehicles in one place.

serviceRecords.title: Service Records
serviceRecords.description: Log every oil change, inspection, and repair with date and mileage.

fullHistory.title: Full History
fullHistory.description: See the complete service history of each car at a glance.

yourData.title: Your Data
yourData.description: Private and secure — only you can see your records.

demo.title: Not sure what you're getting?
demo.description: Browse a fully working demo with sample car data — service records, maintenance schedule, cost chart. No account needed.

landing.footer: Service Book — track what matters for your car

dashboard.title: My Garage
dashboard.emptyDescription: Add your first car to start tracking service history

profilePage.title: Profile
profilePage.dangerDescription: Deleting your account will permanently remove all your cars and service records. This action cannot be undone.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

carForm.photoError: Photo upload failed. Please try again.

recordForm.photoError: Photo upload failed. Please try again.

profileForm.nameError: Failed to update name. Please try again.
profileForm.passwordError: Failed to update password. Please try again.

deleteAccount.confirm:
Are you sure you want to delete your account?

This will permanently delete all your cars and service records. This action cannot be undone.

recordsList.emptyDescription: Start tracking service history for this car

recordCard.mileageWarning: Mileage is lower than the previous record by date

maintenance.title: Maintenance Schedule
maintenance.empty: No maintenance schedules yet. Add one to track when services are due.
maintenance.deleteDescription: "{name}" will be removed. This cannot be undone.

scheduleForm.syncNote: Last done date and mileage are synced automatically from your service history.
scheduleForm.suggestionsNote: Pick from suggestions to auto-fill intervals
scheduleForm.intervalRequired: At least one interval (km or months) is required
scheduleForm.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.

carActionsMenu.transferNote: The car will be permanently transferred to the new owner. You will lose access to it.
carActionsMenu.deleteNote: All service records, maintenance schedules and photos will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.

demoPage.banner: This is a demo — explore the app before signing up
